title: Saro´s Player Ragdoll
description: Players collapse into ragdoll when critically injured — requires another player with a First Aid Kit to revive. DynamX integration.
body:
---

![header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_PlayerRagdoll/MP_SarosPlayerRagdoll_header.webp)

![over](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_PlayerRagdoll/MP_SarosPlayerRagdoll_banner1.webp)

The DynamX Ragdoll Mod adds an exciting new feature: If you have too few hearts, you'll automatically enter the ragdoll mode of the [DynamX Mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dynamx). This brings a realistic gameplay experience and new challenges.

![Features](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_PlayerRagdoll/MP_SarosPlayerRagdoll_banner2.webp)

- **Ragdoll Feature** 🧍
  - When seriously injured, you're automatically placed into ragdoll mode, restricting your movements and actions.

- **Commands** 💻
  - **/revive [player]**: Removes the ragdoll effect, heals the player, and allows respawning.
  - **/respawn [player]**: Instantly respawns the player.
  - **/Instantragdoll (toggle)**: Added a toggle command for instant ragdoll mode.

- **Enhanced Interactions** 🤝
  - **From Beta 1.7 onwards**: Players can be revived by right-clicking on them (from Beta 2.1, a First Aid Kit is required).
  - **From Beta 1.9 onwards**: A GUI appears when you are dead, making management easier.

- **New Configuration Options** ⚙️
  - **Customizable Config**: Adjust mod settings according to your preferences.

- **Vehicle Damage System** 🚗💥
  - Players take damage when colliding with DynamX vehicles.
  - Damage scales with vehicle speed, with configurable min/max thresholds.


![video](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_PlayerRagdoll/MP_SarosPlayerRagdoll_banner3.webp)
